What we do

Complete surface solutions

🍳

Kitchen Countertops

Custom-cut stone surfaces for kitchens of any size. Islands, perimeters, backsplashes — fabricated to your exact measurements.

🛁

Bathroom Vanities

Precision-crafted vanity tops and shower surrounds that bring a spa-like finish to any bathroom, master or guest.

🏠

Kitchen Remodel

Full kitchen transformation — countertops, layout changes, old surface removal, and flawless installation in a single process.

✨

Bathroom Remodel

Complete bathroom upgrades from vanity replacement to full tile and countertop remodels. We handle removal and installation.

🔥

Outdoor & Fireplace

Weather-resistant stone surfaces for outdoor kitchens, BBQ counters, and fireplace surrounds that hold up to Florida's climate.

🏢

Commercial Projects

Reliable supply and installation for contractors and developers. Consistent quality at scale — on time, every time.

Our materials

Every stone, every style

🪨
Granite
Natural durability with unique veining. Heat and scratch resistant.
💎
Quartz
Engineered for consistency. Low maintenance, high performance.
🌿
Quartzite
Natural stone with marble-like beauty and granite-like strength.
⬜
Marble
Timeless elegance. Unique movement and texture in every slab.
🔲
Porcelain
Ultra-thin, UV resistant. Perfect for outdoor and large-format applications.
How it works

Simple process, flawless result

1
Contact Us
Call, text, or fill out the form. We respond within the same business day.
2
On-Site Visit
We visit your location, assess the space, and provide an accurate estimate — no surprises.
3
Material Selection
Choose your stone, edge profile, and finish from our full material catalog.
4
Fabrication
Your surface is precision-cut and finished in our shop to exact measurements.
5
Installation
Professional installation completed within 10 business days. Clean, fast, and done right.

We come to you

Based in Jacksonville, FL, we serve homeowners and contractors across Northeast Florida and beyond — up to 200 miles from our shop.
